purpose: Bind external npm packages into INVOCORDER as installable power surfaces without letting package installation imply truth, authorization, safety, admissibility, recognition, recourse, or external reality.

packages.name: @invocorder/recorder
packages.power_role: hash-chained machine-action recording, replay bundle compilation, signed-bundle support
packages.claim_boundary: native package identity; not installed as recursive self-dependency

packages.name: @verifrax/verifrax
packages.source_role: VERIFRAX authored protocol and evidence boundary
packages.power_role: protocol-adjacent verification and evidence-bound mechanics
packages.claim_boundary: not law, not accepted state, not terminal recognition, not recourse

packages.name: @verifrax/verifrax-verify
packages.power_role: verification interface and replay helper boundary
packages.claim_boundary: verifies where admitted; does not publish proof or recognize truth

packages.name: @verifrax/verifrax-spec
packages.power_role: formal specification and schema-consumable material
packages.claim_boundary: derived spec; not upstream law or accepted state

packages.name: @verifrax/verifrax-profiles
packages.power_role: profile interpretation constraints and compatibility checks
packages.claim_boundary: constrains interpretation; does not rewrite law or specification

packages.name: @verifrax/auctoriseal
packages.power_role: authority object tooling and authorization-scope support
packages.claim_boundary: authority support; not execution, verification, recognition, or recourse

packages.name: @verifrax/corpiform
packages.power_role: execution runtime tools and receipt-supporting mechanics
packages.claim_boundary: records what ran; does not prove what verified

packages.name: @verifrax/cicullis
packages.power_role: merge-boundary enforcement and policy-gate support
packages.claim_boundary: enforcement support; not constitutional truth

packages.name: @verifrax/sigillarium
packages.source_role: seal archive and reference package surface
packages.power_role: seal reference, preservation metadata, archive/certification support
packages.claim_boundary: archive/reference support; not current truth by preservation

packages.name: @verifrax/archicustos
packages.power_role: custody and archival integrity primitives
packages.claim_boundary: primitive support; not full archive authority

packages.name: @verifrax/attestorium
packages.power_role: witness, assertion, and attestation support structures
packages.claim_boundary: attestation primitive; not verification result or recognition

packages.name: @verifrax/guillotine
packages.power_role: termination and irreversible cutoff semantics
packages.claim_boundary: cutoff primitive; not terminal recognition or recourse by itself

packages.name: @verifrax/irrevocull
packages.power_role: irreversible cull, refusal, and finality-adjacent mechanics
packages.claim_boundary: judgment primitive; not recognition-of-record

packages.name: @verifrax/kairoclasp
packages.power_role: time boundary, temporal clasping, and timestamp-adjacent support
packages.claim_boundary: temporal primitive; not accepted epoch by itself

packages.name: @verifrax/limenward
packages.power_role: threshold guard logic and admission/refusal mechanics
packages.claim_boundary: boundary primitive; not accepted admission by itself

packages.name: @verifrax/originseal
packages.power_role: origin binding, provenance sealing, and source assertion support
packages.claim_boundary: origin primitive; not complete authority or verification result

packages.name: @verifrax/validexor
packages.power_role: validation mechanics and low-level verification semantics
packages.claim_boundary: verification primitive; not full verification chamber authority

packages.name: @verifrax/verifrax-api
packages.power_role: API client helpers, machine-access contracts, endpoint support
packages.claim_boundary: machine interface; not accepted state or protocol sovereignty

packages.name: @verifrax/root
packages.power_role: public-entry and host-boundary implementation support
packages.claim_boundary: root implementation; not constitutional root or system completion

packages.name: @kaaffilm/mk10-pro
packages.source_role: KAAFFILM installable creative issuance support package
packages.power_role: external cinematic/issuance-adjacent package surface available to INVOCORDER recording
packages.claim_boundary: external package support; not INVOCORDER truth, authorization, safety, or admissibility

packages.name: @antimatterium/antimatterium
packages.power_role: external machine-action domain package available to INVOCORDER recording profiles
packages.claim_boundary: external action-domain package; not production readiness, starship readiness, or physical production instruction

cli_surface.output: machine-readable status of bound package surfaces and local resolution state
cli_surface.warning: CLI success reports installability and resolution only; it is not an admitted object-chain truth claim.

required_checks: prepublish version gate alignment with VERSION
